summary: Each sentence is limited to 100 characters, too small for an honest runtime trend that separates a linear scan from repeated interval deletion.

workload_bound.source_constraint: sentence1 and sentence2 each contain from 1 through 100 characters

replacement_checks.evidence: Splitting reads each bounded sentence once, and the prefix and suffix pointers together consume each shorter word at most once.
Regression compares all small two-word-alphabet sentence pairs with a brute-force contiguous-deletion oracle and checks maximum-length boundaries.
